steps.title: Set up the savings inequality
steps.content:
Maya earns \$9 per hour for the first 8 hours: \$9 × 8 = \$72.
Let $x$ = hours worked at \$12/hour for the rest of the week.
Total earnings, in dollars: $72 + 12x$.
Maya saves 75% of her earnings, so: $$0.75(72 + 12x) \geq 270$$

steps.title: Solve for the minimum hours
steps.content:
Simplify by distributing: $$54 + 9x \geq 270$$
Subtract 54 from both sides: $$9x \geq 216$$
Divide by 9: $$x \geq 24$$
The least number of hours Maya must work is 24. That confirms C is correct.
